title: Irish Beef Flank Steak Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, this recipe combines the rich flavors of Irish roast beef with the spices of Mexico.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, whisk together cumin, chili powder, and lime juice.
3. Rub the spice mixture evenly onto the beef flank steak.
4. Grill the steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 135°F.
5. Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
6. Meanwhile, grill the sliced onion and chipotle peppers until they are lightly charred.
7. Warm the tortillas on the grill or in the oven.
8. Assemble the tacos by placing a slice of beef onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of grilled onion and a sprinkle of cheese.
